component.name: AbraFlexi CLI
component.summary: Command-line interface for the AbraFlexi accounting REST API

description.p: AbraFlexi CLI is a Symfony Console-based tool for interacting with the AbraFlexi (FlexiBee) accounting REST API from the terminal.

ul.li: status – verify the configured server connection and company.
list-companies – list all companies available on the server.
list-evidences – browse the evidence catalogue of a company.
record – list, display, or create individual evidence records.

description.p: Connection parameters (URL, user, password, company) are supplied via environment variables or a .env file, making the tool easy to integrate into scripts and CI pipelines.

ul.li: status command to verify server connection and company state.
record create operation with mandatory-field validation.
Manpage covering all commands, options, and environment variables.
AppStream metainfo and scalable application icon.
